title: Highly Skilled Migrant Visa (Kennismigrant) - Netherlands
summary: Non-EU nationals with a job offer from an IND-recognized sponsor employer can apply for the Dutch highly skilled migrant residence permit route.
steps: Ensure your employer is an IND-recognized sponsor.
Your employer submits the application to IND on your behalf.
IND assesses salary threshold compliance and sponsor eligibility.
If approved from abroad, attend the Dutch embassy in your country for MVV collection when required.
Register at your municipality (Gemeente) shortly after arrival.
Collect your residence permit (verblijfsdocument) at an IND desk after biometrics.
documents: Degree certificates if required for the role
office: IND (Immigratie en Naturalisatiedienst), with employer-led submission.
notes: Salary thresholds and related conditions change annually; confirm with IND before submission.
